overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, walking through a neon-lit covered shopping corridor transitioning into an open plaza. The environment features vibrant holographic advertisements, futuristic architecture, and scattered pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered neon-lit shopping corridor with Foodscape restaurant

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor passing by large planters and vibrant neon signage

entered.detail: large red neon sign for Foodscape restaurant mounted on the right wall
glowing rectangular ceiling panels emitting green and pink light
rectangular black planter containing tropical plants dividing the walkway
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
large illuminated screen displaying animated arcade game advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered cyberpunk shopping corridor. Neon ceiling panels cast vibrant green and pink light onto the concrete floor. The Foodscape restaurant sign is visible on the right, while digital billboards and graffiti cover the left wall. Large planters with tropical plants line the center of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor with construction barriers and digital advertisements

events.description: ceiling neon panels shift from green-pink to orange-red hue as the corridor opens toward the plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing through the corridor passing digital advertisements and red-white barriers on both sides

entered.detail: temporary construction barriers with red and white stripes flanking the walkway
vertical digital display advertising Street Food with colorful graphics
green neon-style graffiti reading TIGER CLAWS on the right wall
row of red-lit vending machines and arcade cabinets against the left wall
large structural pillar with red Japanese characters painted vertically

segments.scene_description: The corridor transitions into a more industrial section with red-white construction barriers and scattered debris on the floor. Digital billboards for street food and glowing graffiti become prominent. The ceiling lighting shifts to a warmer orange-red tone as the space opens toward a distant plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with Eden Plaza signage and holographic umbrella pedestrians

events.description: exits narrow corridor into the open Eden Plaza area with purple ambient lighting
encountering multiple pedestrians carrying glowing holographic umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza following a pedestrian with a pink glowing umbrella while passing others with blue and yellow umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a pink glowing holographic umbrella walking ahead of the camera
pedestrian with blue glowing umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large yellow neon sign reading EDEN PLAZA mounted on the back wall
translucent plastic strip curtains covering a doorway on the left side
blue illuminated benches lined against the left wall
scattered newspapers and litter across the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into the Eden Plaza, a semi-open area bathed in purple and pink neon light. The large yellow Eden Plaza sign dominates the right side. Several pedestrians with glowing holographic umbrellas walk through the space. The camera follows one pedestrian with a pink umbrella toward a plastic curtain entrance on the left, passing benches and scattered debris.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk corridor that gradually opens into a vibrant urban plaza. It begins by moving through a covered shopping walkway where green and pink ceiling panels illuminate tropical planters and the Foodscape restaurant sign. As the camera progresses, the environment shifts into a more industrial zone characterized by red-white construction barriers and debris, while the lighting transitions to a warm orange-red glow. The scene then expands into the semi-open Eden Plaza, where the atmosphere becomes bathed in purple and pink neon light under a dominant yellow sign. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian carrying a glowing pink holographic umbrella, passing by benches and scattered debris toward a plastic curtain entrance.
